title: cotoneaster angustus
intro: Cotoneaster angustus is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to the Himalayas and China, known for its small white flowers and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cotoneaster angustus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Cotoneaster angustus may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and immune function.
